title: P0: Fix PlaceBlockGoal._dispatched data race with Interlocked
description: The _dispatched field in PlaceBlockGoal is read by DispatchActionsAsync and written by ProcessEventsAsync (two concurrently running async tasks) without any synchronization. Use Interlocked.Increment for writes and Volatile.Read for reads to prevent the write from ProcessEventsAsync never being visible to DispatchActionsAsync, which could cause the goal to hang indefinitely.
